subject: Add Hibernate support in Persistence Policy Models
commit_message:
Add Hibernate support in Persistence Policy Models

Issue-ID: POLICY-3840
Change-Id: I35f1cfde9b983fe19c322612a120e88001cd6544
Signed-off-by: FrancescoFioraEst <francesco.fiora@est.tech>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Verified+1

Build Successful 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/policy-models-master-verify-java/1652/ : SUCCESS

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/policy-models-master-verify-java/1652

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

Please make sure the existing schema is not affected with the changes. I guess these changes are added just because eclipselink wasn't strict like hibernate.

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

Francesco, if you could answer Ajith question and if you don't mind could you outline in wiki, or the ticket the changes that are expected since it seems it may have broader implications?   May be you have it already if so can you can point me out to it - thank you!

1 - db-migrator, schema evolution needed?
2 - are other components that use eclipselink affected in any way?
3 - are all components suppose to move to hibernate from eclipselink, what's the scope of the work, or is this only for clamp?

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1
> 
> Please make sure the existing schema is not affected with the changes. I guess these changes are added just because eclipselink wasn't strict like hibernate.

There is a fix for JpaToscaPolicy, so existing schema will be affected with the changes.

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1
> 
> Francesco, if you could answer Ajith question and if you don't mind could you outline in wiki, or the ticket the changes that are expected since it seems it may have broader implications?   May be you have it already if so can you can point me out to it - thank you!
> 
> 1 - db-migrator, schema evolution needed?
> 2 - are other components that use eclipselink affected in any way?
> 3 - are all components suppose to move to hibernate from eclipselink, what's the scope of the work, or is this only for clamp?

1. I think that a db-migrator, schema evolution needed. I will add into the ticket all schema changes.
2. Policy Model JUnit Tests are using eclipselink.
3. In my understanding all components suppose to move to hibernate from eclipselink, but I need a confirm.
